ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size entry */,
  "underbust_range" TEXT /* Range of underbust measurements in centimeters */,
  "b_cup" TEXT /* B cup size range */,
  "c_cup" TEXT /* C cup size range */,
  "d_cup" TEXT /* D cup size range */,
  "e_cup" TEXT /* E cup size range */,
  "f_cup" TEXT /* F cup size range */,
  "g_cup" TEXT /* G cup size range */,
  "size_number" INTEGER /* Numeric identifier for size category */,
  "size_category" TEXT /* Category of the size (e.g., XS, S, M, L, XL) */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Description of the size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., bra, panty, etc.) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "style" TEXT /* Style type (e.g., push-up, bralette) */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used in the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season when the product is suitable (e.g., summer, winter) */,
  "collection" TEXT /* Collection name the product belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product associated with the inventory entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size associated with the inventory entry */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity of the product in this size */,
  "low_stock_alert" INTEGER /* Indicator for low stock alert (true/false) */,
  "reorder_point" INTEGER /* Minimum quantity at which to trigger a reorder */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when stock falls below the reorder point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order to which this item belongs */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product included in the order */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product at the time of ordering */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the product (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, inventory manager, designer) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the sales report */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales amount for the day */,
  "total_quantity" INTEGER /* Total quantity of products sold */,
  "top_selling_product" TEXT /* Top selling product of the day */,
  "worst_selling_product" TEXT /* Worst selling product of the day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "low_stock_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each low stock alert */,
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inventory entry causing the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Details of the alert message */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_low_stock_alerts_inventory_id FOREIGN KEY ("inventory_id") REFERENCES inventory ("inventory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reorders" (
  "reorder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reorder */,
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inventory entry being reordered */,
  "reorder_date" TEXT /* Date when the reorder was placed */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product reordered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reorder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reorders_inventory_id FOREIGN KEY ("inventory_id") REFERENCES inventory ("inventory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order item being returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date when the return was initiated */,
  "return_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_item_id") REFERENCES order_items ("order_item_id")
)
